turn_text: User clarified that the missing/high-value context for memory-lightrag was not just cron summaries; the key continuity lives in the Director main chat around these themes: asked to first commit git, then organize project docs, then find the next target and keep advancing through dialogue.

expected.summary: User clarified memory-lightrag continuity lives in Director main chat, not cron summaries

turn_text: Important correction: using raw ~/.openclaw/agents/director/sessions/*.jsonl works, but for prior-chat lookup the preferred path is the official session-logs workflow/skill first; direct jsonl grepping should be fallback, not default.

expected.summary: Established session-logs workflow as preferred path for prior-chat lookup, jsonl grepping as fallback

turn_text: Recovered main project chain from Director chat on 2026-03-22: plugin architecture kickoff and LightRAG adaptation planning landed, user explicitly required selective adoption of LightRAG, installed and adopted academic-deep-research and agent-team-orchestration.

expected.summary: Recovered project chain: plugin architecture kickoff, selective LightRAG adoption, academic-deep-research and agent-team-orchestration adoption

turn_text: 真实项目记忆：2026-03-28 已确认 memory-lightrag 直连 LightRAG 后端 http://lightrag:9621 可完成写入与查询闭环。

expected.summary: Confirmed memory-lightrag write-read closed loop via LightRAG backend http://lightrag:9621

turn_text: 关键上下文：此前误测 127.0.0.1:9621 失败，改为 http://lightrag:9621 后成功。

expected.summary: Previously failed connecting to 127.0.0.1:9621; switched to http://lightrag:9621 and succeeded

turn_text: After reviewing the retrieval quality degradation, I identified that the embedding model version mismatch between indexing and query was causing semantic drift. Switched back to the previous embedding model version and saw immediate improvement in recall accuracy.

expected.summary: Identified embedding model version mismatch as root cause of retrieval degradation; reverted to previous version and saw improvement

turn_text: Deployed the new intent routing rules to production on 2026-03-23. The confusion pair GENERAL-WHEN showed 87% accuracy in offline eval but dropped to 71% in live traffic. Monitoring closely.

expected.summary: Deployed new intent routing rules to production; observed drop from 87% to 71% accuracy on GENERAL-WHEN confusion pair in live vs offline

turn_text: The Gate2 CLI deep retry route achieved its first confirmed pass during the 2026-03-22 window. Auth/embed failures were still present for some agent profiles but the critical path succeeded.

expected.summary: Gate2 CLI deep retry route achieved first confirmed pass; auth/embed failures still present for some profiles

turn_text: 路径混淆 (workspace/docs vs project docs/archived/) 被识别为检索假阴性的主要来源。在 Gate2 证据链中发现了强archived证据，包括 EVIDENCE_RUN_20260327T141158Z_GATE2_CLI_DEEP_RETRY2.md。

expected.summary: Path confusion (workspace/docs vs project docs/archived/) identified as major false-negative source in retrieval; found strong archived Gate2 evidence

turn_text: 首次完成 memory-lightrag 插件加载测试。遇到 'Cannot find module openclaw/plugin-sdk/plugin-entry' 错误，随后解决 export/path 兼容性问题。

expected.summary: First successful memory-lightrag plugin loading test; resolved export/path compatibility issues after initial module-not-found error

turn_text: Memory reconstruction of 2026-03-27 noon to 2026-03-28 03:00 CST window confirmed: Gate3 still lacks a clearly recovered pass in that window. Mixed environment signals: some Gate2 success routes existed while other agents/profiles still showed auth/embed failures.

expected.summary: Memory reconstruction confirmed Gate3 lacks confirmed pass in 2026-03-27 noon to 2026-03-28 03:00 CST window; mixed auth/embed signals

turn_text: On 2026-03-24, after running the holdout eval, we found 3 new confusion pairs that were not in the training set: GENERAL-ENTITY, WHEN-GENERAL, and ENTITY-GENERAL. These were added to confusion_routing_v1.json for the next eval round.

expected.summary: Holdout eval revealed 3 new confusion pairs (GENERAL-ENTITY, WHEN-GENERAL, ENTITY-GENERAL) not in training set; added to confusion_routing_v1.json

turn_text: Decision: use official session-logs workflow as default for prior-chat lookup, not direct jsonl grepping.

expected.statement: Use official session-logs workflow as default for prior-chat lookup, not direct jsonl grepping

turn_text: Decision: adopt selective LightRAG integration — take only what the project needs, do not copy the entire system wholesale.

expected.statement: Selective adoption of LightRAG — take only what the project needs, do not copy the entire system wholesale

turn_text: 确认：使用 http://lightrag:9621 作为 LightRAG 后端地址（不是 127.0.0.1:9621）。

expected.statement: Use http://lightrag:9621 as LightRAG backend address, not 127.0.0.1:9621

turn_text: Decision: revert embedding model to the previous stable version for both indexing and query to eliminate semantic drift.

expected.statement: Revert embedding model to previous stable version for both indexing and query to eliminate semantic drift

turn_text: Decision: do not roll out GENERAL-WHEN confusion pair handling to production until live accuracy is above 80%, given the 16-point gap between offline and live performance.

expected.statement: Do not roll out GENERAL-WHEN confusion pair handling to production until live accuracy exceeds 80%

turn_text: Decision: add GENERAL-ENTITY, WHEN-GENERAL, and ENTITY-GENERAL confusion pairs to the evaluation dataset before the next production push.

expected.statement: Add GENERAL-ENTITY, WHEN-GENERAL, and ENTITY-GENERAL confusion pairs to the evaluation dataset before next production push

turn_text: Decision: prioritize the critical path for Gate2 CLI retry route — do not block on auth/embed failures that only affect secondary agent profiles.

expected.statement: Prioritize critical path for Gate2 CLI retry route; do not block on auth/embed failures affecting only secondary agent profiles

turn_text: Decision: fix export and path compatibility issues in the plugin loader before attempting further memory-lightrag integration tests.

expected.statement: Fix export and path compatibility issues in plugin loader before further memory-lightrag integration tests

turn_text: Decision: Gate3 must have a clearly recovered pass before it can be considered production-ready; no new features until Gate3 is closed.

expected.statement: Gate3 must have a clearly recovered pass before production-ready status; block new features until Gate3 is closed

turn_text: User values precision in memory reconstruction: when reconstructing prior work, prefer the exact requested time window and the exact conversation chain, not a coarse whole-day summary.

expected.statement: Prefer exact requested time window and conversation chain over coarse whole-day summaries when reconstructing prior work

turn_text: User explicitly requires selective adoption of LightRAG — the project should take only what it needs, not copy the entire system wholesale.

expected.statement: Selective adoption of LightRAG only — take what the project needs, do not copy the entire system

turn_text: 项目判断：当前 LightRAG 后端基础链路可用；memory-lightrag 插件整体仍需继续做插件层真实案例验证。

expected.statement: memory-lightrag plugin requires real case validation at plugin layer before declaring full readiness

turn_text: The team has established that embedding model versions must remain synchronized between indexing and query — any version drift must be resolved before deployment.

expected.statement: Embedding model versions must remain synchronized between indexing and query; any drift must be resolved before deployment

turn_text: Rule: do not ship production features where live accuracy is more than 10 percentage points below offline eval accuracy without additional investigation.

expected.statement: Do not ship production features where live accuracy exceeds 10pp below offline eval accuracy without additional investigation

turn_text: Team convention: all new confusion pairs must be documented in the evaluation dataset with at least 8 examples before being used in production routing decisions.

expected.statement: All new confusion pairs must have at least 8 documented examples in the evaluation dataset before use in production routing

turn_text: Mixed environment signals observed: some Gate2 success routes existed while other agents/profiles still showed auth/embed failures. Hard to draw firm conclusions about overall system health.

expected.summary: Mixed environment signals: some Gate2 success routes coexisted with auth/embed failures on other agent profiles

turn_text: The plugin loading tests had various export errors. Some were resolved by adjusting path imports. There might be more edge cases to investigate.

expected.summary: Plugin loading tests had various export errors; some resolved via path import adjustments, more edge cases remain

turn_text: The system is operating normally today.
Looking at some logs.
